answer.text: Both long call and long put positions because higher volatility benefits all option buyers

explanation.text:
**The Logic:** Vega is POSITIVE for ALL long (bought) options: - Long call: positive vega (higher vol = higher premium = good for buyer) - Long put: positive vega (higher vol = higher premium = good for buyer)
Short options have NEGATIVE vega (higher vol = higher premium = bad for writer).
**The Trap:** Both calls AND puts benefit from higher volatility. More uncertainty helps ALL option buyers.
**Cross-Exam Context:** Option writers prefer low/declining volatility. Option buyers prefer high/increasing volatility.
**Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Long options: positive vega. Short options: negative vega. Vol up = all premiums up.
